name: kubernetes-event-analyzer
description: Analyze Kubernetes events in CCE clusters to find warning events, node/pod/workload anomalies, and event patterns that indicate failures.

tools.name: huawei_get_cce_events
tools.description: Run huawei_get_cce_events through the shared Huawei Cloud dispatcher.

region.description: Huawei Cloud region, for example cn-north-4.

ak.description: Access Key ID. Prefer HUAWEI_AK environment variable.

sk.description: Secret Access Key. Prefer HUAWEI_SK environment variable.

project_id.description: Huawei Cloud project ID. Prefer HUAWEI_PROJECT_ID environment variable.

tools.name: huawei_query_k8s_events_from_lts
tools.description: Run huawei_query_k8s_events_from_lts through the shared Huawei Cloud dispatcher.

region.description: Huawei Cloud region, for example cn-north-4.

ak.description: Access Key ID. Prefer HUAWEI_AK environment variable.

sk.description: Secret Access Key. Prefer HUAWEI_SK environment variable.

project_id.description: Huawei Cloud project ID. Prefer HUAWEI_PROJECT_ID environment variable.
